allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import mediapipe as mp; pose = mp.solutions.pose; print\('OK, PoseLandmark count:', len\(list\(pose.PoseLandmark\)\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe src/extraction/extract_keypoints.py --video "data/videos/08 - Treadmill Running Technique - How to run safely on a treadmill.__segment_2__cropped.mp4" --output-dir data/keypoints)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python src/labeling/auto_label.py --file "data/keypoints/02 - Running at 13km⧸h - Side View.csv" --dry-run)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python src/labeling/auto_label.py --file "data/keypoints/02 - Running at 13km⧸h - Side View.csv" --flight-fraction 0.4 --median-kernel 3 --dry-run)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python src/labeling/auto_label.py --file "data/keypoints/02 - Running at 13km⧸h - Side View.csv")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python src/visualization/render_frames.py --video "data/videos/02 - Running at 13km⧸h - Side View.mp4" --keypoints "data/keypoints/02 - Running at 13km⧸h - Side View.csv" --n-per-phase 2)
